reference: BUT LEVIN FORGOT ALL THAT AND IT WAS PAINFUL TO HIM TO SEE ALL THESE EXCELLENT PERSONS FOR WHOM HE HAD A RESPECT IN SUCH AN UNPLEASANT AND VICIOUS STATE OF EXCITEMENT
text: But Levin forgot all that, and it was painful to him to see all these excellent persons for whom he had a respect in such an unpleasant and vicious state of excitement.
